nl_query: Show the complete faculty eligibility and performance chain: faculty name, department, courses they are mapped to, boards they are in the pool for, scripts assigned, scripts submitted, and their average evaluation speed.
failed_sql:
SELECT fc.name AS evaluator_name, au.display_name AS user_display_name, d.name AS department_name, b.id AS board_id, sa.script_id AS script_id, sa.submitted_at AS submitted_at, AVG(ea.total_marks) AS average_evaluation_speed
FROM   faculty_course_mapping fcm
JOIN   faculty_cache fc ON fc.id = fcm.faculty_cache_id
JOIN   academic_unit au ON au.id = fc.department_id
JOIN   board b ON b.course_id = fcm.course_id
JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.faculty_cache_id = fc.id AND sa.is_active = TRUE
JOIN   evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.assignment_id = sa.id AND ea.is_active = TRUE
LEFT   JOIN academic_unit d ON d.id = fc.department_id
LEFT   JOIN app_user au ON au.faculty_cache_id = fc.id
WHERE  fcm.is_active = TRUE
GROUP BY fc.name, au.display_name, d.name, b.id, sa.script_id, sa.submitted_at
ORDER  BY fc.name, b.id, sa.script_id;
error: Validation failed (schema): Column 'au_user.display_name' does not exist. Verify that the column is defined on the table referenced by its alias prefix, or that the alias prefix matches a table declared in FROM/JOIN.
